message:
test(evaluator): add heredoc fail-open integration tests

9 tests verifying the evaluator correctly fail-opens when heredoc
extraction encounters errors (unterminated heredoc, exceeded size/line/
heredoc limits, binary content). Also tests strict mode (deny on parse
error) and the heredoc-disabled path.

This was a real coverage gap: heredoc SkipReason variants had unit tests
for detection, but no integration tests through the full evaluator
pipeline confirming fail-open/deny behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
